name: fix-all-issues
description: Parallel PR review and remediation workflow that finds issues, fixes them with background agents, and validates the result.

interface.shortDescription: Review PRs in parallel, fix findings, and iterate to clean validation
interface.longDescription: Orchestrate a multi-round PR review and fix workflow: fan out independent reviewers, triage and dedupe findings, delegate fixes to background workers, rerun lint and tests, update the PR branch, and repeat until a clean round finds no actionable issues.
defaultPrompt: Run /fix-all-issues on this PR with 5 agents
Review my current branch against main and fix every issue you find
